ext:insertMany.ext:documents:
[
                {
                    "route_id": "set-body-header",
                    "route_format": "yaml",
                    "_id": {
                        "route_id": "set-body-header",
                        "version": 1
                    },
                    "version": 1,
                    "content": "# ID: set-body-header
# ENABLED: true
# DESCRIPTION: Demonstrates setBody and setHeader EIPs
# AUTHOR: Camel Studio
# STUB: none

- route:
    id: "set-body-header"
    from:
      uri: "timer:trigger?period=5000&repeatCount=3"
      steps:
        - setHeader:
            name: "MessageType"
            constant: "ORDER"
        - setBody:
            constant: '{"orderId":"ORD-001","amount":199.99,"currency":"USD"}'
        - log:
            message: "[Chapter 1] Header: ${header.MessageType} | Body: ${body}"
        - to: "mock:output"
",
                    "enabled": true
                }
            ]

[
                {
                    "route_id": "hello-timer",
                    "route_format": "yaml",
                    "_id": {
                        "route_id": "hello-timer",
                        "version": 1
                    },
                    "version": 1,
                    "content": "# ID: hello-timer
# ENABLED: true
# DESCRIPTION: Simplest possible route — timer fires every 3s and logs a message
# AUTHOR: Camel Studio
# STUB: none

- route:
    id: "hello-timer"
    from:
      uri: "timer:hello?period=3000"
      steps:
        - log:
            message: "[Chapter 1] Hello from Apache Camel! Timestamp: ${date:now:HH:mm:ss}"
",
                    "enabled": true
                }
            ]
